targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM ingestion_meta.v_run_metrics WHERE $__timeFilter(started_at) AND ('${strategy}' = 'All' OR strategy = '${strategy}') AND ('${pipeline}' = 'All' OR pipeline_id = '${pipeline}');

SELECT ROUND(AVG(run_duration_seconds)::numeric, 2) AS value FROM ingestion_meta.v_run_metrics WHERE $__timeFilter(started_at) AND ('${strategy}' = 'All' OR strategy = '${strategy}') AND ('${pipeline}' = 'All' OR pipeline_id = '${pipeline}');

SELECT ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN run_duration_seconds > 0 THEN read_count::double precision / run_duration_seconds END)::numeric, 2) AS value FROM ingestion_meta.v_run_metrics WHERE $__timeFilter(started_at) AND ('${strategy}' = 'All' OR strategy = '${strategy}') AND ('${pipeline}' = 'All' OR pipeline_id = '${pipeline}');

SELECT ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN source_input_count > 0 THEN invalid_record_count::double precision / source_input_count END)::numeric, 4) AS value FROM ingestion_meta.v_run_metrics WHERE $__timeFilter(started_at) AND ('${strategy}' = 'All' OR strategy = '${strategy}') AND ('${pipeline}' = 'All' OR pipeline_id = '${pipeline}');

SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(started_at, '15m'), strategy AS metric, AVG(CASE WHEN run_duration_seconds > 0 THEN read_count::double precision / run_duration_seconds END) AS value FROM ingestion_meta.v_run_metrics WHERE $__timeFilter(started_at) AND ('${strategy}' = 'All' OR strategy = '${strategy}') AND ('${pipeline}' = 'All' OR pipeline_id = '${pipeline}') GROUP BY 1, 2 ORDER BY 1;

SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(started_at, '15m'), strategy AS metric, AVG(CASE WHEN source_input_count > 0 THEN invalid_record_count::double precision / source_input_count END) AS value FROM ingestion_meta.v_run_metrics WHERE $__timeFilter(started_at) AND ('${strategy}' = 'All' OR strategy = '${strategy}') AND ('${pipeline}' = 'All' OR pipeline_id = '${pipeline}') GROUP BY 1, 2 ORDER BY 1;

SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(started_at, '15m'), strategy AS metric, AVG(CASE WHEN read_count > 0 THEN (insert_count + update_count + delete_count)::double precision / read_count END) AS value FROM ingestion_meta.v_run_metrics WHERE $__timeFilter(started_at) AND ('${strategy}' = 'All' OR strategy = '${strategy}') AND ('${pipeline}' = 'All' OR pipeline_id = '${pipeline}') GROUP BY 1, 2 ORDER BY 1;

SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(started_at, '15m'), strategy || ' / ' || stage_name AS metric, AVG(stage_duration_seconds) AS value FROM ingestion_meta.v_stage_metrics WHERE $__timeFilter(started_at) AND ('${strategy}' = 'All' OR strategy = '${strategy}') AND ('${pipeline}' = 'All' OR pipeline_id = '${pipeline}') GROUP BY 1, 2 ORDER BY 1;

SELECT strategy, status, COUNT(*) AS runs, ROUND(AVG(run_duration_seconds)::numeric, 2) AS avg_run_duration_seconds, SUM(read_count) AS total_read_count, SUM(insert_count + update_count + delete_count) AS total_change_count, ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN source_input_count > 0 THEN invalid_record_count::double precision / source_input_count END)::numeric, 4) AS avg_invalid_ratio FROM ingestion_meta.v_run_metrics WHERE $__timeFilter(started_at) AND ('${strategy}' = 'All' OR strategy = '${strategy}') AND ('${pipeline}' = 'All' OR pipeline_id = '${pipeline}') GROUP BY 1, 2 ORDER BY 1, 2;

SELECT started_at, pipeline_id, strategy, run_mode, status, ROUND(run_duration_seconds::numeric, 2) AS run_duration_seconds, read_count, ROUND((CASE WHEN run_duration_seconds > 0 THEN read_count::double precision / run_duration_seconds END)::numeric, 2) AS records_per_second, ROUND((CASE WHEN source_input_count > 0 THEN invalid_record_count::double precision / source_input_count END)::numeric, 4) AS invalid_ratio, ROUND((CASE WHEN read_count > 0 THEN (insert_count + update_count + delete_count)::double precision / read_count END)::numeric, 4) AS change_ratio, artifact_total_bytes FROM ingestion_meta.v_run_metrics WHERE $__timeFilter(started_at) AND ('${strategy}' = 'All' OR strategy = '${strategy}') AND ('${pipeline}' = 'All' OR pipeline_id = '${pipeline}') ORDER BY started_at DESC LIMIT 50;

list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT strategy AS __text, strategy AS __value FROM ingestion_meta.v_run_metrics ORDER BY 1;
list.label: Strategy
list.name: strategy
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT strategy AS __text, strategy AS __value FROM ingestion_meta.v_run_metrics ORDER BY 1;

list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT pipeline_id AS __text, pipeline_id AS __value FROM ingestion_meta.v_run_metrics ORDER BY 1;
list.label: Pipeline
list.name: pipeline
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT pipeline_id AS __text, pipeline_id AS __value FROM ingestion_meta.v_run_metrics ORDER BY 1;
